title: Fourier Transform by Sound
summary: A short textbook that explains frequency-domain decomposition through music.

sections.title: Frequency domain
sections.markdown: The frequency domain describes which frequency components make up a signal.

sections.title: A chord as a sum
sections.markdown: A musical chord can be modeled as several pure tones added together.

sections.title: Exercise
sections.markdown: If a spectrum has peaks at 440 Hz and 880 Hz, identify the fundamental and first overtone.

concepts.name: Frequency decomposition
concepts.summary: Breaking a complex signal into frequency components.
